title: Anthropic Billing Issues?
abstract: We just received an email from Anthropic, which mentions that we have been overcharged for several months.  They do not mention the nature of the error or the magnitude.  Did anyone else receive something similar?  Curious how widespread this is.  I'm surprised and concerned that they sent the
abstract_zh: 我们刚收到Anthropic的邮件，提到我们几个月来被多收了费用。他们没有说明错误的性质和程度。其他人有没有收到类似的情况？好奇这种情况有多普遍。我对他们发送账单感到惊讶且担心。
